SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 07

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT D'EUFEMIA, ROSE S. D'EUFEMIA, ANTHONY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 240 O'FARRELL STREET #502, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $1,920.00 RENT, $750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,670.00, STAYED UNTIL FEB-21-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS. NO FURTHER STAYS BY ANY COURT. NO OTHER PERSONS CAN CLAIM RIGHT OF POSSESSN THRU DEFTS. MONEY JUDGMNT IS STAYED UNTIL DFTS FAIL TO VACATE, TURN OVER KEYS AND REMOVE BELONGINGS OR UNTIL DFTS PERSUE CLAIM AGAINST PLTFF; IN WHICH CASE JUDGMNT AMOUNT MAY BE USED AS OFFSET.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
